name: CoinGecko_Market_Intelligence
description: Provides comprehensive cryptocurrency market intelligence via CoinGecko's free API. Enables the Mind to track token prices, discover trending coins, analyze historical price movements, compare exchange volumes, and monitor global crypto market health.
progressive_unlock: Price lookups and trending coins available immediately. Historical charts and exchange data unlock after Mind has queried prices at least twice to establish crypto engagement pattern.
constraints: READ-ONLY access: CoinGecko API is inherently read-only, no write operations exist
Respect CoinGecko free tier rate limit of 30 calls/minute (Demo API key)
Always use coin IDs (not symbols) for unambiguous lookups — cache ID mappings in LTM
Never expose CoinGecko API key in logs, outputs, or error messages
Cache price data in STREAM with 30-second TTL to avoid redundant calls within same conversation
Cache trending results in LTM with 1-hour TTL as trending updates infrequently
For historical charts, prefer 'daily' interval for periods >2 days to reduce payload size
Validate coin IDs against CoinGecko /coins/list before making detail requests
Present price data with appropriate decimal precision (2 for USD, 8 for BTC pairs)
Track API usage in STREAM.coingecko_rate_counter to prevent throttling across tools

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm coin IDs are lowercase slugs, vs_currencies are valid ISO codes or crypto symbols, and numeric ranges are within bounds.
Retrieve CoinGecko API key from TENET.apiKey.coingecko. Construct query parameter 'x_cg_demo_api_key={key}' for all requests.

Determine query intent: price check (quick lookup), coin deep-dive (full profile), trending discovery (what's hot), historical analysis (chart data), exchange comparison (volume/trust), or global overview (market health).
For price checks: execute CoinGecko_GetPrice with coin IDs and desired vs_currencies. Include market_cap and 24hr_change for enriched context. Cache in STREAM.cg_price_{ids_hash} (30s TTL).

For coin deep-dives: execute CoinGecko_GetCoinData with market_data=true, community_data=true. Extract key metrics: price, ATH, ATL, market cap rank, 24h/7d/30d changes. Cache in STREAM.cg_coin_{id} (60s TTL).
For trending discovery: execute CoinGecko_ListTrending. Present top coins with price, market cap rank, and 24h change. Cache in LTM with key 'coingecko_trending' (1-hour TTL).

For historical analysis: execute CoinGecko_GetMarketChart with appropriate days parameter. Use daily interval for >2 day periods. Extract price/volume trends. Store summary in STREAM.cg_chart_{id}_{days}.
For exchange comparison: execute CoinGecko_ListExchanges. Sort by trade_volume_24h_btc. Highlight trust_score for reliability assessment. Cache in LTM with key 'coingecko_exchanges' (6-hour TTL).
For global overview: execute CoinGecko_GetGlobalData. Extract total_market_cap, total_volume, market_cap_percentage (BTC/ETH dominance), active_cryptocurrencies. Cache in STREAM.cg_global (60s TTL).
Compile results with proper formatting. Present prices with currency symbols, percentages with +/- indicators, large numbers with abbreviations (B/M/K). Update STREAM with query metrics.
Log query execution in LTM with key 'coingecko_query_{timestamp}' including intent, tools used, result count, and rate limit remaining. Track cumulative usage for throttle prevention.
